name: Social Intelligence Agent
short_description: Social intelligence for profiles, timelines, and post analytics.
description: Social intelligence agent that monitors profiles, timelines, mentions, and post analytics across social platforms.

capabilities.name: social/profile_lookup
capabilities.description: Retrieves public profile information including verification status, follower/following counts, bio, and account statistics.

capabilities.name: social/timeline_fetch
capabilities.description: Fetches recent posts with engagement metrics, timestamps, and media information.

capabilities.name: social/mention_monitoring
capabilities.description: Collects mention activity for a target account over a requested sample size.

capabilities.name: social/post_analytics
capabilities.description: Returns detailed engagement metrics for an individual post by ID or URL.

commands.description: Fetches comprehensive user profile including display name, bio, verification status, follower/following counts, tweet count, account creation date, location, and website URL.
Retrieves user's recent posts with optional count parameter (default: 10, max: 100). Returns formatted timeline with engagement metrics and statistics.
Returns recent mentions for a username — tweets from other users that mention the target, including engagement metrics and timestamps.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Social media handle to search mentions for

commands.description: Returns detailed engagement metrics for a single post including views, likes, retweets, replies, quotes, and bookmarks. Accepts post IDs or URLs.
Lists all commands and usage examples.
